@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents not fully implementing requested functionality), weak verification (failing to catch errors in generated code), step repetition (repeatedly asking the same question or providing the same information), task derailment (proposing simplified implementations instead of addressing the core problem), information withholding (not providing complete information to other agents), action-reasoning mismatch (reasoning about a problem but taking incorrect actions), premature termination (stopping a task before completion), ignoring other agent's suggestions, and loss of conversation history. There are also instances of agents ignoring suggestions from other agents and failing to recognize termination conditions.
